_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Establish and oversee waiver processes for cyber career field entry and training qualification requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessment, future-state requirements modeling, gap analysis, and talent acquisition and development strategy formulation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-010 (RC, cosine: 0.455), LS-K-009 (LS, cosine: 0.435).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 1.7/10 (raw 0.173). Shared vocabulary: [requirements]. DCWF-only terms [career, cyber, entry, establish, field, oversee] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, analysis, assessment, conduct, current] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.878, R=0.859). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.9%, N:74.5%, C:24.6%). No dominant classification for "Establish and oversee waiver processes for cyber career field entry and training" vs "Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessmen" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.465 > STS 0.173 (gap +0.292). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [requirements] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.2%. Shared tokens: [requirements]. DCWF-only: [career, cyber, entry, establish, field, oversee]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, analysis, assessment, conduct, current].
